title: Glinty Enchantments
description: This texture pack replaces Minecraft’s default enchantment glint with a simple and modern design. The result is a cleaner look that feels less distracting while still making your enchanted gear stand out.
body:
![Intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c28bf39517724d82b72b0a80a7fc291791a428f.png) #

💎 Glinty – Modern Enchantment Glint

The Glinty texture pack is a custom Minecraft pack designed to replace the default enchantment effect with a sleek, minimal, and modern look. Instead of the distracting, flashy glint you’re used to, Glinty gives your enchanted items a clean shimmer that feels stylish while still highlighting their magical value.

Whether you’re PvPing, grinding in survival, or building your dream world, Glinty makes enchanted gear stand out without overwhelming your screen, keeping your gameplay sharp and polished.


# ✨ Features - 💎 A reimagined enchantment glint with a simple, modern design - 🎨 Less distracting shimmer while keeping items visually clear - 🧩 Minimalistic and stylish, tailored for both casual and competitive players - 🌐 Works seamlessly in singleplayer and multiplayer - 🚫 No unnecessary clutter – just a clean and intuitive visual upgrade Perfect for players who enjoy a modern, refined Minecraft experience, Glinty enhances your enchanted gear with clarity and elegance, while staying lightweight and distraction-free. _For further questions, contact polar882 on discord._
